entry.title: Re: select query with for all entries not fetching the records

entry.title: Re: Hardware key for the sap system.
entry.content: I don't have saplicense anywhere in the pc, also where are you loging in ....?

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to query BPC model using SQL?
entry.content:
Member formula results are never stored. As a custom workaround, you can save the result using EPMSavedata. And then you can use the backend table where member formula are stored.

Also check sap note " 3019453 - Which table stores the member fomulas "

entry.title: Re: TM link between /scmtms/d_torrot and /scmtms/d_trqstg
entry.content:
Hi William,

/SCMTMS/TOR and /SCMTMS/TRQ are different Business objects.
Freight Units are stored in /SCMTMS/TOR BO. Right DB Table for Freight Unit Roots is /SCMTMS/D_TORROT, for Stops - /SCMTMS/D_TORSTP, Stages (STOP_SUCCESSOR Node) - /SCMTMS/D_TORSTS.

/SCMTMS/TRQ stores Transportation Requests. One of use-cases is storing OTRs (Order-based Transportation Requirement) and DTRs (Delivery-based Transportation Requirement) in standalone TM setup.

Best regards,
Uladzimir.

entry.title: Re: How to add parameters to GUI Transaction Fiori tile and access it in Custom Fiori App
entry.content: Bumping

entry.title: BW/4HANA - Unsupported Media Type
entry.content:
Hi Community, 

Was trying to create an Info Provider in our BW/4HANA Perspective on the SAP HANA Studio eclipse install but getting the error as show in the snapshot " Unsupported Media Type" .

Would someone be able to suggest how I could resolve this.  

Attaching the installation details and Installed software details in the snapshots as well.

entry.title: Re: Calculate Current Month, Last year same month, Previous Month, YTD, on SAC Report
entry.content: @Charlielin. Use the %GrandTotal() or GrandTotal() Mathematical Functions.

entry.title: Re: Calculate Current Month, Last year same month, Previo...
entry.content:
For Q2, use the %GrandTotal() or GrandTotal() Mathematical Functions.  See SAC Help.Sap.com
If this is all relative to Net Income as total, then divide each row by Net Income.

GrandTotal(Account)Returns the grand total of all the Account values in the result set. Filters are included in the calculation of the grand total.GrandTotal(Sales) returns the aggregated value of Sales.

 

%GrandTotal(Account)Returns the percentage of the grand total that each value represents.%GrandTotal(Sales) returns the percentage of the grand total that each value represents.

entry.title: [ByD] Notification rule for any changes in Supplier master data
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

 

I'm searching on creating rule to get email notification for any change in supplier master data.....but looks like this is not available in SAP, 

I was able to set up rule to get notified for bank data change or address change....wanted to make sure if any small changes can be notified.

 

Best regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: [ByD] Notification rule for any changes in Supplier m...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

 

You can create a Workflow Rule for the Business Object Supplier with the Rule Type as Notification. 

Select the Timing as 'On Every Save '. If you leave this field blank then the rule is applied every time the business object is saved.

Then consult the help documentation on Creating a Workflow Rule to define conditions and actions according to your specific situation.

Then active the new created rule, notification would be triggered to the maintained email address once supplier gets saved (changed).

 

Best regards,

Gavan

SAP Technical Support, Public Cloud ERP

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Hello  Team,

Here is the Validation 
1) Price with Currency
2) Overall Status Text

entry.title: Re: How to create AMDP in S/4 Hana Public Cloud ADT & Get...
entry.content:
Thank you for your question, @SiddharthaDas.

without any further context I could imagine a number or ways to take advantage of the abstraction and readily available services provided with core data services and their views without even the need to go down to the underlaying data model or entities.

Let’s dive into how you can consume standard CDS views in ABAP, especially with an emphasis on extensions in embedded Steampunk (SAP S/4HANA with Steampunk capabilities).

Consuming CDS Views in ABAP

When working with CDS views in ABAP, especially in the context of extending functionalities in embedded Steampunk, you will typically:

  1. Define and Extend CDS Views
  2. Read Data from CDS Views in ABAP Programs
  3. Use Views in Analytical Scenarios

1. Define and Extend CDS Views

You can consume existing standard CDS views or create your own. Let's start with an example where we have a standard CDS view and we want to extend it.

Standard CDS View

Assume you have a standard CDS view SAP_CDS_VIEW.

Extending the CDS View

If you need to extend this standard CDS view, you can use the EXTEND VIEW statement:

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZCDSVIEWEXT'@EndUserText.label: 'Extended CDS View'extend view SAP_CDS_VIEW with ZCDS_VIEW_EXTENSION {    new_field1,    new_field2}

 

2. Read Data from CDS Views in ABAP Programs

Once you have your CDS views (extended) as per need, you can read them in your ABAP code. In embedded Steampunk, the process is similar to classical ABAP but optimized for cloud.

Example ABAP Code to Read CDS View

Here’s how you can consume this CDS view in your ABAP program:

DATA: lt_data TYPE TABLE OF zcds_view_extension.
SELECT * FROM zcds_view_extension INTO TABLE lt_data.
LOOP AT lt_data INTO DATA(ls_data).  WRITE: / ls_data-field1, ls_data-field2, ls_data-field3.ENDLOOP.

3. Using Views in Analytical Scenarios

In analytical scenarios, you typically use CDS views for defining complex queries and projections. These views can be directly consumed in SAP Fiori apps or analytical tools.

Example: Using CDS View in Fiori

Suppose you have extended or created analytical CDS views tagged with annotations for analytical purposes:

 

@Analytics.query: true@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK@EndUserText.label: 'Analytical CDS View'define view ZANALYTICAL_CDS_VIEW as select from SAP_CDS_VIEW {    key field1,    field2,    field3,    @AnalyticsDetails.query.display: [        { position : 1, label: 'Measure 1' }    ]    measure1,    @AnalyticsDetails.query.display: [        { position : 2, label: 'Measure 2' }    ]    measure2}

Using ABAP Development Tools (ADT) in Eclipse for Embedded Steampunk

When working in embedded Steampunk, you'd typically use ABAP Development Tools (ADT) in Eclipse. Here's a brief on how to proceed:

  1. Create CDS Views: Use ADT to define CDS views.
  2. Extend Existing Views: Use the EXTEND functionality in ADT.
  3. Use @annotations: Utilize annotations like @Analytics.query to mark views for analytical use.
  4. Integrate in Your ABAP: Consume these CDS views in your ABAP classes or reports as shown previously.

Summary

  • Define/Extend CDS Views: Create or extend existing CDS views for your data models.
  • Read from ABAP: Use standard ABAP SELECT statements to query data from these CDS views.
  • Utilize Analytical Views: Mark your CDS views with appropriate annotations for analytical scenarios.

By following this approach, you can seamlessly transition your old ABAP skills into the new age of ABAP with CDS views, ensuring clean, maintainable, and efficient extensions in embedded Steampunk.

Feel free to ask if you need any more details or further clarification! Otherwise, please mark this question as solved. Thank you.

entry.title: Client Proxy - WS SOAP with different namespace for QAS & PRD
entry.content:
Hello to all!

I'm facing the following issue:

I'm consuming a WS SOAP using Client Proxy. This solution is in PRD System already.
The Web Service provider will change the namespace of the WS and will have a different one for QAS and PRD system.

What are the best aproach to solve this:

1. How can I change the namespace of an existing proxy?
Do I have to create it again from scratch?

2. Since the namespace in the Client Proxy is created in DEV System and cannot be change in QAS and PRD system, how is the best way to handle this?
Do I need to have two different Client Proxy and use one or another depending the system?

 

Thanks, Pablo

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear David 
I am Umesh 42years old, I am a highly motivated individual with over 20 years of experience in finance and costing. At this stage in my career, I am eager to transition into the IT field and have identified SAP as a promising avenue for professional growth.

I am particularly interested in your SAP learning program as a means to acquire the necessary skills to embark on this career change. I am confident that obtaining a SAP certification will significantly enhance my career prospects within the IT industry.

I am willing to join SAP learning initiative under change my career in midlife

Thanking you to consider me for the initiative.

UmeshOC

entry.title: Alternative storage location
entry.content:
Hi SAP support team,

We have a requirement where in case if stock is not available in one storage location then it should check another storage location and update in the sales order/Delivery

We request to Badi to fulfil the requirement. We know this requirement can be fulfill with a ATP with ABC confirmation but looking for alternative solution for development. 

regards,

Motiveminds team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Alternative storage location
entry.content:
Hi, 

For outbound deliveries, you can consider below BADIs:

LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM Modify Delivery ITEM

LE_SHP_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE Modify Standard and Custom Fields for Delivery Header and Item

 

Best Regard,

entry.title: Custom apps displayed as blank page in public cloud
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

Hi Expert,


We followed note https://me.sap.com/notes/3274236/E to create a custom tile of My Inbox(F0862) to add new filters other than the default ones.
We added the expertMode parameter and assigned to the related catalog,

 

but after publishing, it only displays a blank page and is unusable...

I found that, for on-premise we can troubleshoot and clear the cache to solve the issue, but I am not sure how to handle it in public cloud...
Do you have any suggestions for solving this problem?

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Find IQ Table Growth
entry.content:
Unable to get table information

Question and Answer:
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: IQ Performance & Tuning

Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Slow Server Performance

Q: Detail the IQ environment: exact IQ server version, OS version
A: Windows DIGITS, 16.1.030

Q: When did the issue last occur (YYYY,MM,DD))
A: DIGITS,08,15

Q: Is the issue reproducible on demand? If so please list the steps to reproduce the issue
A: No


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Find IQ Table Growth
entry.content:
it seems that you want to check IQ table growth from IQ system views.
There is no internal IQ system table/view having information to track data size of individual tables but you may check entire IQ data growth if you perform regular IQ full backups.
Please refer to KBA 2773774 below for more detail information.

--2773774 - How to find IQ data growth - SAP IQ
https://me.sap.com/notes/2773774

entry.title: Re: Parallel Processing of an report
entry.content: Try this: Implementing Parallel Processing (sap.com).

entry.title: Monitor Workforce person replicated from SAP MDI
entry.content:
We have replicated the workforce data from EC to MDI and further replicated from MDI to S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Please provide guidance how to view and confirm in S/4HANA Cloud side for the replicated data from EC.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Monitor Workforce person replicated from SAP MDI
entry.content:
Dear customer,

The HR Administrator can monitor the replication status for each workforce person by following SAP Help Portal - Message Monitoring for Worker Integration.

In S/4HANA Cloud screen, it is also possible to check the successfully replicated workers in the app Manage Workforce or using the search model Worker Overview.

Best regards,

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: S4HC供应商寄售流程 Supplier Consignment (2LG)
entry.content:
Hi Qi

请问我在做从寄售库存转储到非限制库存时出现"无法计算覆盖范围"，不知道是哪里需要调整?
谢谢

entry.title: Is it possible to plan a product in all planning areas together?
entry.content:
There are several planning areas in the system, product planning is always against one specific product in one specific planning areas. Is it possible to plan one specific product in all planning areas? For example, all available stock of a specific product from all planning areas can be considered during MRP.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to plan a product in all planning area...
entry.content:
Product ID and Supply Planning ID are two basic parameters in product planning, it is impossible to run MRP against a specific product in all planning areas.

However, through setting procurement type under the Planning tab in material master data, and maintaining corresponding transport lane between internal sites, MRP in planning area A can create a stock transfer proposal in planning area B, thus you can transfer available stock from B to A to finally fulfill the demand in A.

Please refer to below help documents:

Material Planning:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/2cc94b23722d10149641b01f63f17764.html

Source Determination in Planning:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/9b34fdf28661101498e8897131647296.html

entry.title: Re: Calculate Current Month, Last year same month, Previo...

entry.title: How to check Document about Perpetual Inventory System and Periodic Inventory System.
entry.content:
現在、SAP S4 PERSON_NAME cloud publicでは、三分法ではなく、売上原価対立法が採用されていると思います。

売上原価対立法が採用されていることが明記されているドキュメントはありますでしょうか。

I think SAP S4 PERSON_NAME cloud public currently uses Perpetual Inventory System instead of the Periodic Inventory System.

If SAP has document in the community or KBA, mentioning that SAP supports Perpetual Inventory System (売上原価対立法) rather than Periodic Inventory System(三分法).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to check Document about Perpetual Inventory Syste...
entry.content:
Please Kindly use below link and search the related information. This is what I retrieved for you on Google.

SAP使用経験って、どの程度のことを言うの？ (fpacamp.com)

entry.title: Converting CS Notifications Category to PM Notification Category
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Customer Service (CS) will be replaced by S/4HANA Service (SAP Note 2269324).

For the foreseeable future we plan to use PM instead of S/4HANA Service. To this extend we would like to retain the current Notification Types as we have a large volume of history and custom enhancements based on the current Notification types. 

While it is possible to change existing CS Order Types to PM Order Types, it is not possible to do the same with CS Notifications. (Changing the Notification Category from "03" to "01")

We recognise it is not a simple change as there are many dependent tables using the Notification Category, but other customers must be facing the same issue. 

So the question is: Does other customers plan to switch existing CS Notification Types to PM Notification Types, and if so, how do you plan to achieve this?

Appreciate any help and guidance.

entry.title: Re: B1SLayer: A clean and easy way to consume SAP Business One Service Layer with .NET
entry.content:
Hello friends,
I have just discovered B1SLayer library and must start from shouting big "thank you" to Bruno for such a great contribution to SAP community.

I'd like to use the library to execute SQL queries. There is an example provided but it sounds like  it is missing a step. The text reads "Once your query is registered (don't forget the parameters), you can call it with B1SLayer..."; however, there is no code that shows how to register the query.

Could someone post a working example of a code that successfully executes SQL query, with all steps, including registration - thank you !

お世話になっております。

.....

「ジョブ名：SM：EXEC SERVICE」の並列処理数を減らすまたは直列処理とする方法についてご教授をお願いします。

以上、よろしくお願いいたします。

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Question:

Please advise how to reduce the number of parallel processes for Job SM: EXEC SERVICE.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SM：EXEC SERVICES並列処理数について(How to setup parallel job o...
entry.content:
ご担当者様

平素よりお世話になっております。

お問合せにつき、KBA 1992277 - Administering Parallelization Of Background Processing Of EarlyWatch Alert  をご確認ください。

以上、よろしくお願いいたします。

SAPサポート

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Solution:

Please refer to KBA1992277 - Administering Parallelization Of Background Processing Of EarlyWatch Alert

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Call for ALM
entry.content: Looking forward to this!

entry.title: Automatic approval for maintenance orders workflow is not working
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a reactive maintenance order, and according to the best practice for reactive maintenance (Reactive Maintenance (4HH_US)), we should be able to start a flexible workflow for approval. I sent the order, but it never reaches my inbox or gets approved. I can see the order in the Fiori application, and under the authorization status, I see that the automatic workflow has the order, but it’s been days, and it hasn’t been approved or rejected:

I thought the automatic approval workflow would approve the order instantly.

Does anyone know why this might be happening? Could it be due to a missing configuration? Is there a way to release this order from the current workflow to continue with the proces?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: SAP DBTech JDBC: [262]: invalid query name: JDBC_GET_TABLES
entry.content:
Hi, there

I got a JDBC Driver error when trying to get table metadata by JDBC DatabaseMetadata. It seems there's no proc or function named "JDBC_GET_TABLES":

com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCDriverException: SAP DBTech JDBC: [262]: invalid query name:  JDBC_GET_TABLES

As I dived deeper into its source code, more query names with the prefix "JDBC_GET_" emerged and they were all called by a strange statement "CALLQ", which I had never seen before. 

Since I do not have direct access to connect with the HANA DB, troubleshooting becomes difficult.  Same as connecting HANA DB, connecting the other DBs like MySQL, Oracle, and MSSQL also needs a jump server, but they work well. I enquired to the system admin and he told me there's no proc or function found in the HANA DB, this confused me more and wondering what "CALLQ" can be and how it works.

What caused this and how to solve it?

 

The query names:

The "CALLQ" Statement:

Java codes work well on Oracle, MySQL, and Microsoft SQL Server.

 

// Get connected DB Info
DatabaseMetaData dbMetaData = connection.getMetaData();

String dbType = dbMetaData.getDatabaseProductName();
String dbVersion = dbMetaData.getDatabaseProductVersion();
String dbUser = dbMetaData.getUserName();

// Get Table Metadata
String catalog=null, schemaPattern=null, tbl="T001", columnNamePattern=null;
String tblComment = null,tblCatalog = null,tblType = null,tblSchema = null;
ResultSet rs = dbMetaData.getTables(null, schemaPattern, tbl, new String[]{"TABLE", "VIEW", "SYSTEM TABLE", "GLOBAL TEMPORARY", "LOCAL TEMPORARY", "ALIAS", "SYNONYM"});
while (rs.next()) {
    tblCatalog = rs.getString("TABLE_CAT");
    tblSchema = rs.getString("TABLE_SCHEM");
    tblType = rs.getString("TABLE_TYPE");
    tblComment = rs.getString("REMARKS");
    System.out.println("Found [" + tblType + "] in Catalog [" + tblCatalog + "], Schema [" + tblSchema + "]: " + rs.getString("TABLE_NAME") + "(" + tblComment + ")");
}
rs.close();

// Get Column Metadata
List<TableColumnMetadata> metadataList = new ArrayList<>();
ResultSet columnsResultSet = dbMetaData.getColumns(catalog, schemaPattern, tbl, columnNamePattern);
while (columnsResultSet.next()) {
    TableColumnMetadata metadata = new TableColumnMetadata();
    String tblName = columnsResultSet.getString("TABLE_NAME")==null?tbl:columnsResultSet.getString("TABLE_NAME");
    metadata.setDbType(dbType);
    metadata.setDbVersion(dbVersion);
    metadata.setDbUser(dbUser);
    metadata.setDbCatalog(tblCatalog);
    metadata.setDbSchema(tblSchema);
    metadata.setTableType(tblType);
    metadata.setTableName(tblName);
    metadata.setTableComment(tblComment);
    metadata.setColumnPosition(columnsResultSet.getInt("ORDINAL_POSITION"));
    metadata.setColumnName(columnsResultSet.getString("COLUMN_NAME"));
    metadata.setColumnComment(columnsResultSet.getString("REMARKS"));
    metadata.setColumnType(columnsResultSet.getString("TYPE_NAME"));
    metadata.setColumnLength(columnsResultSet.getInt("COLUMN_SIZE"));
    metadata.setColumnPrecision(columnsResultSet.getInt("COLUMN_SIZE"));
    metadata.setColumnScale(columnsResultSet.getInt("DECIMAL_DIGITS"));
    metadataList.add(metadata);
}
columnsResultSet.close();

 

The Data Class:

 

import lombok.Data;

@Data
public class TableColumnMetadata {
    private String dbType;
    private String dbVersion;
    private String dbUser;
    private String dbCatalog;
    private String dbSchema;
    private String tableType;
    private String tableName;
    private String tableComment;
    private int columnPosition;
    private String columnName;
    private String columnComment;
    private String columnType;
    private int columnLength;
    private int columnPrecision;
    private int columnScale;
}

entry.title: Custom Field - SAP S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

The requirement is to create a custom field on the Manage Customer Master Data app inside the sales areas section and there needs to be predefined set of drop down values to be added to that custom field.

I know how to create a custom field in customer master, but not sure how to create one inside the section of sales areas tab under master data and also no clue on how to add drop down values to that.

If somebody could throw some insights on the above requirement would be helpful.

SAP Fiori SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales 

Thanks!

entry.title: BAPI_DOCUMENT_CHANGE2: Document info record update object links - DOCUMENTDIRECTION
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are using BAPI_DOCUMENT_CREATE2 and BAPI_DOCUMENT_CHANGE2 for the management of supplier invoice documents. We need to pass DOCUMENTDIRECTION to the OBJECTLINKS table to enable navigation from the object link to the document in MIRO. Interestingly, when we manually add the link via gui, the document direction is automatically set to A, visible via BAPI_DOCUMENT_GETDETAIL2. 

However, despite our efforts to pass DOCUMENTDIRECTION to BAPI_DOCUMENT_CHANGE2- OBJECTLINKS along with OBJECTTYPE, OBJECTKEY and OBJECTKEY_LONG, our attempts have been unsuccessful. Although, the object link is saved, the document direction A is not retained. 

Has anyone in the community encountered this issue before? Your assistance would be greatly appreciated 🙂

entry.title: Purchase order my inbox cant go to external link
entry.content:
I am facing the problem where I can't embed external link to my inbox approve purchase order, I saw on the other blog that I have to change from MPC_EXT class, but it still doesn't work. We just can use "related objects" to embed link there, but my problem is the "related objects" page is not available in FIori mobile version or SAP Start.
Does anyone know how to embed exteranl URL in My Inbox Purchase Order Approve? Thank you

entry.title: Re: 使用SAC从HANA Cloud导入数据建立模型的练习
entry.content: 非常感谢你的文章！！解决了困扰我好久的问题！！

entry.title: Re: Acquired model variables do not filter data
entry.content:
Hi JBARLOW_CADENCE_ANALYTICS , 

    Model variable is for formula calculation, but not for data filtering. Please check this page: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/cc325c7fdec04f4f860d26dde4d48f83.html

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: BW Series – Getting Started
entry.content:
Hi Sandy,

Thanks for the initiation ...Great start ...

Eagerly waiting for the series...and need information the below infomration 

Copied the below info from the comments:

 would like to know more about the parallels in Datasphere for the below SAP BW metadata objects -

1. Start/End routine lookups 2. Expert routine code 3. Customer Exit variables

4. Formula variables 5. Hierarchy variables 6. Virtual characteristics & key figures

7. aDSO (Type DSO) 8. aDSO (Type Cube) 9. Multiprovider (Union)/Composite Provider(Union)

entry.title: Re: How to activate 2LIS_03_BF in RSA5
entry.content: Check in RSA6. If you find the extractor in Rsa6. It means it’s activated and ready for use . You can also check if it is available in rsa3

entry.title: Re: A Step by Step process to trigger Odata Service to send data based on Event Configuration in SAP
entry.content: Hii laxmi may i know in detail if i have a API link from third party and i want to send PO Changes data using that link automatically without any background job.

entry.title: My 'other' Hobby - Hedgehog Handler - taking care of garden 'wildlife' down under...
entry.content: Handle with Care

entry.title: Re: Send data to a third party URL
entry.content:
Hii gurus ,

can anyone guide in detail if i have a third party URL and i want to send my sap data using that third party URL.

entry.title: Linux Ubuntu HXEDownloadManager_linux.bin: Command not found
entry.content:
Hello,

System:
Distributor ID: Ubuntu
Description: Ubuntu 22.04.4 LTS
Release: 22.04
Codename: jammy

Java

 

rammi@rammi-laptop-i7:~/Schreibtisch/PROJECTS/xxx/sap-hana/stuff$ java -version
openjdk version "11.0.24" 2024-07-16
OpenJDK Runtime Environment (build 11.0.24+8-post-Ubuntu-1ubuntu322.04)
OpenJDK 64-Bit Server VM (build 11.0.24+8-post-Ubuntu-1ubuntu322.04, mixed mode, sharing)

 


With recommend steps i try to start the manager to finally achieve install local hana-express:

- download the sap_dm.bin (renamed from HXEDownloadManager_linux.bin) to my /bin folder
- open terminal and type 

 

rammi@rammi-laptop-i7:~/Schreibtisch/PROJECTS/xxx/sap-hana/stuff$ ls -a /bin |grep sap 
sap_dm
rammi@rammi-laptop-i7:~/Schreibtisch/PROJECTS/xxx/sap-hana/stuff$ sudo sap_dm --help
[sudo] Passwort für rammi: 
sudo: sap_dm: Befehl nicht gefunden <=== Command not found?

 

Any other command located in /bin works as expected.

Questions
- What is wrong by run the binary?
- Why the command is not found although the file is installed?

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Entity data:

Class method:

entry.title: Re: Requirement related to PO release strategy
entry.content:
Hi Siddhesh ,

As you may already know, the standard PO workflow condition only contains the overall net value. Therefore, your requirement may not be achievable with the standard setup. You may want to check on enhancements for your requirement.
To implement your custom logic for the conditions, you may want to explore the available extensibility options for the PO workflow process. Please refer to this link for information on the available BAdIs in S4 Hana Cloud for custom conditions.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/9a6d0c5e42d04d47aa40f51927c15453.html?q=MMPUR_WORKFLOW_AGENTS_V2#custom-start-and-step-conditions-by-business-add-in-(badi) 

Regards,
EIP

entry.title: Re: HI, I am having 15 years in experience in Accounts an...
entry.content: Dear, Below link can be used to search SAP partners. https://partnerfinder.sap.com/

entry.title: Re: PGP Encryption for RSA algorithm with key length 2048...
entry.content: Able to achieve requirement with in built in PGP encryption palate component after selection proper config as per receiver requirement and storing file with .pgp extension. thanks

entry.title: Re: NVE number and setup in EWM
entry.content:
Hi Akash,

NVE number is important if you want to trace the HU.
Maybe it also depends on the ERP-EWM integration, as number ranges can be set on ERP side as well.
The following help portal tells more about the topic:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/e3cccb53ad377114e10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US&version=2020.002&q=sscc

SSCC can also be connected with RFID:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/07cacb53ad377114e10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US&version=2020.002&q=sscc

entry.title: Re: CoA mapping sheet for USA and UK SAP B1 localization
entry.content: Hi, I need the G/L account mapping sheet which is used into USA / UK database. Means , Which G/L against which account we need to map. Regards, Nikunj

entry.title: Re: Alternative storage location
entry.content: Are you sure these BAdI are going to change storage location in case of a stock shortage and retrigger ATP in the new storage location?

entry.title: Re: Alternative storage location
entry.content: Consider stock determination instead of custom BAdI enhancements.

entry.title: Re: Modernize your BW Landscape: SAP BW/4HANA and SAP Datasphere with SAP BW Bridge
entry.content:
Thanks for the insights. I'm missing the down sides or known problems with the different scenarios. E.g. if we move to datasphere (with or without BW bridge) we will loose what ever we have in the query layer and the SAC reports we have spend 1½ year FTEs to create will have to be rebuild. Could you please try to elaborate on the "hidden" cost of the different solutions.

With kind regards

Kristian Appel

entry.title: Re: Mesclar dados OJDT JDT1 com a AJDT - Merge OJDT JDT1...
entry.content:
Hi Ederson,

the relation can b found here

https://biuan.com/?q=ojdt and https://biuan.com/?q=jdt1 

Try to find a TrnsId with more lines in AJDT

SELECT TransId 
FROM 
AJDT
GROUP BY TransId
HAVING Count(TransId) > 2

And then have a look on the lines

DECLARE @TransId as INT
SET @TransId = 807944
;
with DataJDT AS
(
SELECT TOP 20 * FROM AJDT WHERE TransId = @TransId
UNION ALL
SELECT TOP 20 * FROM OJDT WHERE TransId = @TransId
)
SELECT TransId,UpdateDate,LogInstanc,DataVers,* FROM DataJDT

regards

Lothar

entry.title: Re: iFlow OData Processing Preview Button Disabled
entry.content:
Hi @Aijaz-Qureshi ,

The preview button will be enable only if you used externalized parameter value in your OData query option.

Currently you have selected fields which are visible directly due to which its disabled. 

Ex: If you have stored some values/query under {{OData Query}} externalized parameter and then you can use this parameter in query option directly and then you will able to see value under this parameter by Preview button.

Regards,

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Consume HANA views in SAP Datasphere
entry.content: You can create a connection to you HANA DB in Datasphere, then import those HANA views into Datashpere as a remote table to access them  remotely. You also can build graph view on top of those HANA view for transformation or replicate the data in those HANA view for better perforamnce in Datasphere.

entry.title: Re: select query with for all entries not fetching the records
entry.content: IF you are using FOR ALL ENTRIES, please fetch all the key fields in your SELECT and try.

entry.title: Re: iflow content modifer Issue
entry.content:
Hi @Jorge99  ,

This error is specific to XPath for field ECCOMPANY . Make sure you are passing correct input payload in simulation mode and this has ECCOMPANY field as per value/path provided in content modifier. 

Regards,

Nikhil

entry.title: Sales order specific production not allowing to GRN in production plant.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Sales Order is created in plant A and sales order specific order in Plant B. Plant B is a Production Plant. During Goods receipt system is doing 101 movement in plant A which is not Production Plant. I need to do GRN in plant B (Production). Kindly suggest steps to solve this scenario.

Regards,

Tejas. P

entry.title: Re: Cross Company Procurement With Project Stock(Q)
entry.content:
Hello All,

While performing the scenario we are stuck at the Point of Goods Issue where its trying to issue the goods system is picking the WBS element which maintained at the time of Purchase order.

I think some different configuration needs to be done.

entry.title: SAP GRC replacement?
entry.content: What's the new SAP GRC replacement product? Can it perform risk analysis on the SAP Cloud? What other production out there at is similar to SAP GRC?

entry.title: Re: Action [core] page-editor/create-custom-section faile...
entry.content:
Hi,

Even after adding "sap.fe.templates": {},
         "sap.fe.core": {} I am getting the same error. For another project, I am able to add section.

Not sure why the issue is coming for this particular project only.

entry.title: Re: SAP CI - HTTP/OData Receiver Adapter Authentication O...
entry.content:
Hi @David_Davis  ,

As i understand, to connect on-premise system from Cloud Integration , we need to use SAP Cloud Connector. 

Below are methods supported by Cloud connector to connect on-premise system.

 https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/authenticating-users-against-on-premise-systems 

Regards,

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Application Log as Launchpad or V4 Odata serv...
entry.content:
Hello phil_soady,

you can use to use the Fiori Reuse Library to display application log: How to Use the Fiori Reuse Library 

Best regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: what is Data Management and Landscape Transformation...
entry.content:
Hello Venkat,

Here are the two resources that you can refer to know all about SAP's offering for DMLT:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/move-to-sap-s-4hana-with-selective-data-transition/ba-p/13455833

https://www.sap.com/sweden/services-support/service-offerings/data-mgmt-landscape-transformation.html

Thank You!

entry.title: Re: SAP EC Payroll (ECP) client copy and client refresh
entry.content:
hi,

client copy just copies client dependend data and programs. you dont want to delete client independent things, because they would be missing in all clients. if you delete a client, you delete just client dependent data. 

 

br

entry.title: Geekiest hobby, Conducting knowledge transfer sessions allows me to deepen my understanding.
Re: HCM Processes and Forms - Infotype 0014
entry.content: Hi Chris. I am trying this with cost assignment fields (Order, Cost center and WBS) for IT14 and IT15. I have followed your advice and set manually REFEX field to "X". I have selected the following fields in screen structure HCMT_BSP_PA_XX_R0015: I0015_KOSTL for cost center, I0015_AUFN for Order and I0015_POSNR for WBS-element. I get a correct output for cost center with the right values in the dropp-down list. But I do not get any result/output for WBS-element and order. Do not get any values. Is is the correct fields?

entry.title: Re: Oci: How handel Cancel button?
entry.content:
Hi,

SRM application does have "Back to application" link by default. If you want to make it application independent, it has to be done within the OCI catalog. I'm not sure if you will find a unique solution, as catalogs are using different programming technics.

Best regards,

Timea

entry.title: Re: Mobile Preview App Now Available
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP Build Apps Preview is not working in IOS Build Apps Application.
I get session expired always, I tried entering the many times as well.

entry.title: Supplier invoice changes
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

How to check the supplier invoice changes list  ,that made even after approval process and to trigger again for approval.

entry.title: Error activating Business Content Sales Analysis in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi community,

we would like to activate the SAP Datasphere Business Content Sales Analysis (Version 1.2.0) but at the time of importing the analytic model we get the following system failure message:

We couldn’t save your object SAP_SD_RL_SalesDocumentItem_V2 because it’s dependent on missing objects:
SAP.TIME.VIEW_DIMENSION_DAY#_DAY_OF_W_SAP.
Create or import the missing objects first, and then reimport your package.

Within the space SAP_CONTENT we already activated the time dimension and checked SAP.TIME.VIEW_DIMENSION_DAY but we could not create or import _DAY_OF_W_SAP as attribute or assoziation. Also we could not get more information to the item _DAY_OF_W_SAP.

Does anyone know more about _DAY_OF_W_SAP and the way how to import or create?

Best regards
Christian

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Preview is not working in IOS Build Apps Application
entry.content: I always get session expired error and I tried entering the code many times.

entry.title: Re: Should we move away from the main Analysis for Office tools in favour of the SAC Excel Addin?
entry.content:
Hi Steven,

we just implemented Datasphere and SAC. Before that we also used CDS-Views and Analysis for Office.

But from my experience the SAP Analytics Cloud Add-In is not there yet to replace Analysis for Office.

entry.title: Re: Task 2 - CDS View Entity Associations ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content: Task - 2
